value: Complete friendship and health advice social networks among households in 17 rural villages bordering Lake Victoria in Mayuge District, Uganda in 2013. Nodes are households and edges represent either a close friendship or a trusted health advisor connection, obtained via a name generator questionnaire.
['G. F. Chami et al., \Social network fragmentation and community health.\" Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. USA 114(36)
